highlights.text: I wrote on Wednesday at 4pm: “Bear case tomorrow: Short term though, the loss of 6847 could provoke a dip….
I frequently talk about how ES cycles between two types of price action: 1) Elevator down sells (this is where ES sells in a non-stop straight line).
These occur after elevator down sells and see ES put in a face-ripping squeeze.
These are caused by my core setup, the Failed Breakdown.
Resistance is up at 6872.” On Friday it was the big the Failed Breakdown here that caused the the 100 point squeeze, and the task for bulls today was to defend it.
In today’s newsletter I’ll talk this, I’ll do a deep dive into the Breakdown Shorts and Failed Breakdowns that caused last weeks big sells and Friday’s rally.

post_title: SPX Is At A Big Inflection Point. Can Bulls Buy Today's Dip? November 18 Plan
